params.title: Favorite Lunch
params.description: Vertical bar graph appears. Favorite Lunch data. Pizza 45, Tacos 25, Salad 10, Burgers 15. Scale of 5.
Question appears on screen: How many more students chose pizza than tacos and salad together?

beats.text: You've got graph reading down. You've got comparison down. But look at THIS question.

elements.description: Vertical bar graph. Favorite Lunch data. Pizza 45, Tacos 25, Salad 10, Burgers 15. Scale of 5.
Question displayed: How many more students chose pizza than tacos and salad together?

beats.text: See that word 'together'? This question needs more than one step. We'll come back to THIS question in the lesson. And you'll be able to answer it.
